description: Registry of all environments/locations used across Nova Force scripts. Source of truth for which concept boards exist and which still need generation via Runway.

locations.name: Glasshook Pier
locations.notes: Morning coastal light, tourist shops dark, fishermen gone, commuters filtering through. Low-gold light.

locations.name: Meridian Central Plaza
locations.notes: Glass towers, the Spire backdrop. Busy urban center — crowds, street traffic, ambulances.

locations.name: Meridian Central Side Street
locations.notes: Side streets off the main plaza. Urban, daytime.

locations.name: Parking Garage
locations.notes: Dim emergency lighting, concrete, lower level even darker. Marcus's isolation space.

locations.name: City Streets (General)
locations.notes: Generic Meridian streets for crowd/livestream footage.

locations.name: Lowline Corner Store (Okafor's)
locations.notes: Mr. Okafor's shop. Older blocks, corner stores, street chairs. Warm interior.

locations.name: Lowline Side Street
locations.notes: Elena and the live wire scene. Residential neighborhood feel.

locations.name: Lowline Residential
locations.notes: Residential block, locked building exterior. Fire crew present.

locations.name: Lattice Surveillance Van
locations.notes: Near-black environment. Multiple screens, coffee rings, cable management. Rook's workspace.

locations.name: Stairwell / 4th Floor
locations.notes: Interior of the locked building. Dark stairwell, 4th floor landing.

locations.name: Fire Escape
locations.notes: Nighttime city skyline, the Spire lighting up in the distance. Reflective mood.

locations.name: Lattice Operations Center
locations.notes: Screens, darkness, institutional. Cold, clinical. Rook and Grey's command post.
